title: SubagentHandoff
description: Frozen artifact-based handoff between a parent agent and a child subagent. A chat message alone is never sufficient. Schema version 1.0.0.

parent_agent.description: Identifier of the parent agent making the handoff.

child_agent.description: Identifier of the child agent receiving the handoff.

authorized_input_paths.description: Absolute or relative paths the child agent is authorized to read.

authorized_input_shas.description: Map of authorized input path to frozen SHA-256 hash.

forbidden_inputs.description: Paths the child agent must not access, including hidden reasoning and mutable scratch state.

required_outputs.description: Output artifact paths the child agent must produce.

output_directory.description: Directory where outputs must be written.

deadline_or_timeout.description: Maximum time in seconds before the handoff times out.

result_envelope_path.description: Path to the subagent result envelope produced by this handoff.
